current_profile_verdict: Canonical Stage4B is acceptable only as local/watch; full 4B or Stage3 promotion needs non-price reserve/capital bridge.
low-MAE rebound was tradable but construction/PF balance-sheet thesis belongs to C30/C05, not generic C01 backlog
Stage3-Green allowed only when reserve quality, CSM durability, solvency capital, and payout execution are all explicit.
Local-4B-Watch is allowed but full4B should wait for payout, asset sale, or tender cash bridge
